ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( (RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSWaterLabTestRequisition' && FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'DrinkingWaterSystem' && FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'DrinkingWaterSourceIntake' && (FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c = 'Facility' &&( ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Sewerage') || ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Child Care') ) ) ),
(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSDyeTestRequisition' && (FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Facility' || NOT(ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Sewerage')))),
(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSLeadWaterTestRequisition' && (FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Facility' || NOT(ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Child Care')))),
(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRadonTestRequisition' && (FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Facility' || NOT(ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Child Care')))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Facility is not eligible for this Lab Test Requisition
